tagline: A simple, open-source file sharing host.
description:
PsiTransfer is a simple, self-hosted open-source file sharing service that allows you to share files securely and easily without registration.

**Key Features:**
- **No Registration Required:** Share files instantly without creating an account.
- **Privacy and Control:** All files are stored on your own server, giving you complete control over your data.
- **Password Protection:** Protect shared files with a password for enhanced security.
- **Upload Expiry:** Set uploaded files to automatically expire after a specific time to save storage space.
- **Admin Panel:** Manage all uploads through a clean admin panel.
- **Delivery Target:** Send files to predefined email addresses (configuration required).
- **Responsive Web Interface:** Clean and user-friendly interface that works perfectly on all devices.

**Learn More:**
- [PsiTransfer GitHub Repository](https://github.com/psi-4ward/psitransfer)
author: psitrax

releaseNotes.en_US:
- v2.4.1 includes security fixes and should be updated.
- UTF-8 support was added for content disposition in file downloads.
- Dependencies and changelog generation were updated.
